examples: If you do not slurp, then your host will think that you do not like your food and will take offense.
She took a slurp from her mug.
He takes a slurp from a cup of black coffee.
Wine critics swirl, sniff, sip, slurp and spit scores of wines in a single sitting.
They slurp caramel macchiato as coffee and believe that candy, when placed in a bowl, becomes cereal.
